understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level (and complete all levels) without landing on spikes. Each level allows 2 attempts of 50 turns each.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT is the only movement; gravity then pulls the player vertically until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes specific breakable tiles (`x`) at given coordinates. UNDO reverts the last action. Landing on spikes (`u`/`v`) ends the attempt immediately. The structured state provides landing previews and corridor scans to guide path choices.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level (and complete all levels) without landing on spikes. Each level allows 2 attempts of 50 turns each.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT is the only movement; gravity then pulls the player vertically until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes specific breakable tiles (`x`) at given coordinates. UNDO reverts the last action. Landing on spikes (`u`/`v`) ends the attempt immediately. The structured state provides landing previews and corridor scans to guide path choices.
